login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: No self-registration — admin accounts are provisioned internally. No social login on this surface.
login.demoHint: Demo sign-in is enabled — press <1>Continue</1> with the pre-filled account, or use any email containing <2>+admin</2>.
login.signedIn: Signed in to the admin console.
login.accessDenied: Access denied — this dashboard is for administrator accounts only.
login.networkError: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and API base URL.
login.sessionError: Login succeeded but the response did not include tokens. Check API contract.

forgot.title: Reset access
forgot.subtitle: Enter your admin email. We will call the password reset request endpoint on your configured API base URL.
forgot.success: If that email is registered for an admin account, you should receive reset instructions shortly.

reset.title: Choose a new password
reset.tokenHint: Open this page from the link in your reset email so the <1>token</1> query parameter is present.
reset.success: Password updated. You can sign in with the new password.

accessDenied.title: Access denied
accessDenied.subtitle: This area is restricted to platform administrators. If you believe this is a mistake, contact your project owner.
